== Navigation & Terminal Cheatsheet

*Leader* = `Space`

→ Back to link:index.md[main cheatsheet]

=== Window / Split Navigation

[cols=",,",options="header",]
|===
|Keys |Mode |Action
|`Ctrl-h` |Normal |Move to left split
|`Ctrl-j` |Normal |Move to split below
|`Ctrl-k` |Normal |Move to split above
|`Ctrl-l` |Normal |Move to right split
|`Ctrl-↑` |Normal |Shrink split height
|`Ctrl-↓` |Normal |Grow split height
|`Ctrl-←` |Normal |Shrink split width
|`Ctrl-→` |Normal |Grow split width
|===

=== Terminal

[width="100%",cols="34%,33%,33%",options="header",]
|===
|Keys |Mode |Action
|`++<++leader++>++t` |Normal |Toggle terminal split (15-line split at
bottom)

|`Esc` |Terminal |Exit terminal insert mode
|===

The terminal toggle reuses the same terminal buffer across open/close
cycles. Press `++<++C-k++>++` after `Esc` to jump back to the editor
window.

=== Copilot Chat Window

[width="100%",cols="34%,33%,33%",options="header",]
|===
|Keys |Mode |Action
|`++<++leader++>++c` |Normal |Move focus to left window (jump back from
Copilot chat panel)
|===
